description_long: This is a steampunk-inspired wristwatch featuring a large, round metallic case with a weathered brass finish and prominent rivets. The dial is pale and features intricate, faintly visible markings, with a set of ornate hands and a compass-like motif at the center. Attached to the case is a secondary, smaller circular gauge on the upper left, possibly for additional timekeeping or decorative function, and a wind-up key protruding from the right side, enhancing its vintage mechanical aesthetic. The strap is made of thick, dark brown leather with visible white stitching and reinforced with metal rivets at the ends. The watch has a robust, industrial look, with several metallic components and textured surfaces. The overall design is both functional and decorative, making it a statement accessory suitable for urban or themed environments.
description: A steampunk-style wristwatch with a large brass case, ornate dial, and thick brown leather strap, featuring decorative gauges and a wind-up key.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full watch face, secondary gauge, wind-up key, and detailed leather strap stitching.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the watch case, the protruding gauge, and the curvature of the leather strap.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the leather strap, visible rivets, and the attachment points for the strap.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the wind-up key and gauge from a different angle, as well as the strap's buckle and curvature.
attribute_dial_design: The dial is pale with faint, intricate markings and a compass-like motif at the center. It features ornate hands and subtle indices, with no numerals or subdials visible. The style is decorative and vintage, reminiscent of steampunk aesthetics.
attribute_strap_type: Thick brown leather strap with visible white stitching and metal rivet reinforcements.
attribute_watch_face_display: Analog display with ornate hands and a decorative, compass-inspired dial; no digital elements or complications are visible.
